calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Kaquishka Turner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Kimberly Villegas, Supportive Housing Manager for plaintiff Housing Clinic, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Christopher Mabalot.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.'s complaint was filed on June 24, 2018.
Defendant Christopher Mabalot's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 2, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on August 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Christopher Mabalot, for possession only, as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 520 South Van Ness Avenue, Room #234, San Francisco, CA 94110.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present, represented by Kimberly Villegas.
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Mabalot is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of August 27, 2018 remains on calendar.
